sections.paragraph:
ὀλέθριος, ον (s. next entry; Hom. et al.; s. Crönert 186; LXX) act. sense (so mostly, incl. Polyb. 2, 68, 10; 3 Km 21:42) pert. to being totally destructive, deadly, destructive τίνειν ὀλέθριον δίκην undergo lethal punishment 2 Th 1:9 v.l.—DELG s.v. ὄλλυμι.

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

act. act. = active

incl. incl. = including

Polyb Polyb , III–II b.c.—List 5

pert. pert. = pertaining (to)

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 702
